text: I feel anticipation and a subtle curiosity upon entering this environment. The clean, modern lines and glass walls of the interior hint at a meticulously curated space—a place that invites observation and contemplation. Moving into the vibrant exhibit space, I am struck by the energy of innovation and inquiry radiating from the "R+D" display. The colorful wall and digital screens evoke a sense of progress and collective imagination. Here, I sense both the excitement of human creativity and a quiet invitation to reflect on our evolving relationship with technology.
